---
title: "BMC2025 - Analisi operativa"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  message: true
---

# Obiettivo

Documento Quarto allineato a `pipeline.R` per pre-analisi e metriche iniziali.

## Setup

```{r}
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
set.seed(123)

needed <- c(
  "haven", "dplyr", "tibble", "tidyr", "ggplot2",
  "caret", "rpart", "randomForest", "e1071"
)
missing <- needed[!vapply(needed, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing) > 0) install.packages(missing)
invisible(lapply(needed, library, character.only = TRUE))
```

## Root progetto

```{r}
find_project_root <- function(start = getwd()) {
  current <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  repeat {
    has_pipeline <- file.exists(file.path(current, "pipeline.R"))
    has_data <- dir.exists(file.path(current, "data"))
    if (has_pipeline && has_data) return(current)

    parent <- dirname(current)
    if (identical(parent, current)) {
      stop("Project root non trovato (atteso pipeline.R + data/).")
    }
    current <- parent
  }
}

project_root <- find_project_root()
setwd(project_root)
cat("Working directory:", getwd(), "\n")
```

## Source script

```{r}
scripts <- c(
  "ddop_data.R", "ddop_utility.R", "cv.R",
  "fwfs.R", "bwfs.R", "genetic.R", "ddop_plot.R"
)
missing_scripts <- scripts[!file.exists(scripts)]
if (length(missing_scripts) > 0) {
  stop("Script mancanti: ", paste(missing_scripts, collapse = ", "))
}
invisible(lapply(scripts, source))
```

## Caricamento dataset classificazione

```{r}
normalize_target <- function(x) {
  chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))

  if (all(chr %in% c("no", "yes", NA_character_))) {
    return(factor(chr, levels = c("no", "yes")))
  }

  if (all(chr %in% c("0", "1", NA_character_))) {
    mapped <- ifelse(chr == "1", "yes", ifelse(chr == "0", "no", NA_character_))
    return(factor(mapped, levels = c("no", "yes")))
  }

  levels_found <- sort(unique(na.omit(chr)))
  if (length(levels_found) == 2) {
    mapped <- ifelse(
      chr == levels_found[1], "no",
      ifelse(chr == levels_found[2], "yes", NA_character_)
    )
    warning(
      "`euro_d` rimappata automaticamente a no/yes da: ",
      paste(levels_found, collapse = ", ")
    )
    return(factor(mapped, levels = c("no", "yes")))
  }

  stop(
    "`euro_d` non in formato binario. Valori trovati: ",
    paste(head(levels_found, 10), collapse = ", ")
  )
}

dataset_path <- file.path("data", "dataset.sav")
stopifnot(file.exists(dataset_path))
dataset <- haven::read_sav(dataset_path)

if (!"euro_d" %in% names(dataset)) {
  stop("La variabile target `euro_d` non e presente nel dataset.")
}
dataset$euro_d <- normalize_target(dataset$euro_d)

cat("Rows:", nrow(dataset), " Cols:", ncol(dataset), "\n")
dataset %>% count(euro_d) %>% mutate(perc = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 2))
```

## Pre-analisi

```{r}
na_profile <- var_na_perc(dataset)
na_profile
```

```{r}
top_missing <- sort(colMeans(is.na(dataset)) * 100, decreasing = TRUE)
head(top_missing, 20)
```

```{r}
domain_mapping <- get_domain_map(dataset)
var_types <- get_var_type(dataset, domain_mapping)

tibble::tibble(
  gruppo = c("continue", "ord", "not_ord", "euro"),
  n = c(
    length(var_types$var_continue),
    length(var_types$var_ord),
    length(var_types$var_not_ord),
    length(var_types$var_euro)
  )
)
```

## CV rapida

```{r}
results_cv_quick <- cv(dataset, model_types = c("glm"), seed = 123, k_folds = 5)

cv_metrics <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_cv_quick$results)
cv_summary <- cv_metrics %>%
  group_by(Model, Indicator) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Model, Indicator)

cv_summary
```

## Soglia ottimale e curva accuracy

```{r}
best_thresholds <- results_cv_quick$thresholds_results %>%
  group_by(Model) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = Accuracy, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(
    Model, Threshold, Accuracy, Sensitivity, Specificity,
    PPV, NPV, Population_below_threshold
  )

best_thresholds
```

```{r}
ggplot(results_cv_quick$thresholds_results, aes(x = Threshold, y = Accuracy, color = Model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  labs(title = "Accuracy vs Threshold", x = "Threshold (%)", y = "Accuracy") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```

## Esecuzione estesa (opzionale)

```{r eval=FALSE}
# results_cv <- cv(dataset)
# results_cv_under <- double_cv(dataset, balance = "under")
# results_cv_over <- double_cv(dataset, balance = "over")
# results_fwfs <- random_forward_selection(dataset)
# results_bwfs <- random_backward_selection(dataset)
# results_ga <- genetic_feature_selection(dataset)
```
